args.query: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as num_reviews FROM review WHERE date >= '2016-01-01' AND date <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, num_reviews DESC LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as num_reviews FROM review WHERE date >= '2016-01-01' AND date <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, num_reviews DESC LIMIT 5;

args.query: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as num_reviews FROM review WHERE CAST(strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') AS DATE) >= '2016-01-01' AND CAST(strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') AS DATE) <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, num_reviews DESC LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as num_reviews FROM review WHERE CAST(strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') AS DATE) >= '2016-01-01' AND CAST(strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') AS DATE) <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, num_reviews DESC LIMIT 5;

args.query: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as num_reviews FROM review WHERE CAST(COALESCE(try_strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), try_strptime(date, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), try_strptime(date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')) AS DATE) BETWEEN '2016-01-01' AND '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, num_reviews DESC LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as num_reviews FROM review WHERE CAST(COALESCE(try_strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), try_strptime(date, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), try_strptime(date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')) AS DATE) BETWEEN '2016-01-01' AND '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, num_reviews DESC LIMIT 5;
